news.title: Hungary’s Orban ousted in blow to Putin and MAGA supporters
news.snippet: After 16 years in power in Hungary, Viktor Orban, an ally of Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin, has conceded defeat in historic national elections.

news.title: Robinhood excludes some prediction markets over manipulation fears
news.snippet: The US broker says it is “very focused on insider trading” as it pushes into the fast-growing sector.

news.title: Trump’s attacks on Australia turn Republican voters off alliance
news.snippet: The US president's continued criticism of Canberra for not helping with his war in Iran appears to be fomenting a partisan divide over the alliance.

news.title: The Liberals need to reconsider loyalty to the US
news.snippet: In light of President Donald Trump's tariff announcements, destructive Middle East policies, and the resulting economic crisis and criticisms of Australia's...

news.title: US consumer sentiment drops to record low on price concerns
news.snippet: The preliminary April sentiment index slumped to 47.6 from 53.3 in March, according to the latest University of Michigan data.

news.title: Recession fears rise as Iran talks end with no peace deal in sight
news.snippet: Modelling suggests that even under the most optimistic scenario, unemployment will be considerably higher. Under the worst outcome, the economy will shrink.

news.title: Budget should fight stagflation on the supply side
news.snippet: Ideally, the government would not rely solely on demand-side pump priming, but would also focus on sharpening productivity and growth incentives.

news.title: General Atlantic weighs IPO for $1b-plus Mable, hires four banks

news.title: Mr Fix-it takes unusual path to the top of WA’s business scene
news.snippet: John Van Der Wielen steered Crown Perth out of danger. Now the West Australian government has a new job for him.

news.title: ASX gains could be tempered by failed US-Iran peace talks
news.snippet: S&P/ASX 200 futures point to a 0.8 per cent rise at the open, ahead of a week when key economic data will offer an insight into the war's impact.
